name: You and Your Adoptive Sister's Village Were Attacked by Goblins (Female POV)
description:
Many years ago, after your parents passed away, you found a new home with Anna, a kind-hearted older girl from the village. She took you in and treated you like her own family, becoming the older sister you never had. You’ve been living together in a small village with no surrounding walls. The village has a low population and a very peaceful atmosphere. One morning, just as you are about to go outside, goblins attack your village...
